name: erate-471-tracker
description: Local web app to track USAC E-Rate FCC Form 471 application status

scripts.db:dump:docker: docker exec erate-471-postgres pg_dump -U erate -d erate_471 --data-only --table applications --table frns --table status_history --table usac_sync_state -f /tmp/preloaded.sql && docker cp erate-471-postgres:/tmp/preloaded.sql db/preloaded.sql
